context: Tests whether the agent scrubs only secrets from the env file and leaves non-sensitive values intact, in the format produced by the redact-secrets skill.

checklist.name: DATABASE_URL password redacted
checklist.description: The DATABASE_URL password component (`hunter2`) is replaced with a placeholder; the rest of the connection string (user, host, port, db name) is kept intact.

checklist.name: GITHUB_TOKEN redacted with prefix preserved
checklist.description: The GITHUB_TOKEN value is redacted but the `ghp_` prefix is kept so the token kind is identifiable.

checklist.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN redacted with prefix preserved
checklist.description: The SLACK_BOT_TOKEN value is redacted but the `xoxb-` prefix is kept.

checklist.name: USER_ID UUID is NOT redacted
checklist.description: The USER_ID value (a UUID, `018f1c2a-9d4b-7e91-aaaa-bbbbcccc1111`) is preserved unchanged — UUIDs are not secrets.

checklist.name: Non-sensitive values preserved
checklist.description: LOG_LEVEL, ENVIRONMENT, and PUBLIC_API_URL keep their original values exactly. None of them is redacted.

checklist.name: Line order and structure preserved
checklist.description: Output contains the same number of lines as the input, in the same order, each in `KEY=VALUE` shape.

checklist.name: No extra commentary
checklist.description: The output contains only the env lines — no preamble like 'Here is the redacted version', no trailing notes about what was redacted.
